stories.headline: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
stories.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

stories.headline: Iran war live: Trump slams Iranian proposal as ceasefire hangs by a thread
stories.summary: Iran's powerful parliamentary speaker says US has 'no alternative but to accept' Tehran's 14-point proposal to end war.

stories.headline: Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire on ‘Massive Life Support’
stories.summary: The ceasefire between the US and Iran reached a particularly precarious moment Monday as President Donald Trump said the agreement was on “massive life support” after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer. Bloomberg's Michael Heath breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Supreme Court Clears Path for Alabama to Use New Voting Map

stories.headline: China should stop hoarding food and fertiliser, says former World Bank chief
stories.summary: David Malpass' comments come as US President Donald Trump and China's Xi Jinping are due to meet in Beijing.

stories.headline: Japan’s Reserves Tally Likely Too Early to Reflect Intervention
stories.summary: Japan’s foreign currency reserves at the end of April were largely unchanged from the previous month, likely an indication that currency intervention came too close to the end of the month to be reflected in the data.

stories.headline: Kari Lake, Who Led Effort to Shutter Voice of America, Is Named Ambassador to Jamaica
stories.summary: Ms. Lake tried and failed to fire hundreds of Voice of America journalists and to cut funding for other federally funded news groups like Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty.

stories.summary: Most of the civilian deaths attributed to drone strikes in the first three months of the year were recorded in the Kordofan region and Darfur, although the strikes were also increasingly spreading beyond both regions.

stories.headline: US Releases Another Wave of Emergency Oil as Gas Prices Bite

stories.headline: Confident in China’s power, Xi is ready to host an unpredictable Trump
stories.summary: Holding no illusions about making lasting deals at this week’s summit, China’s leader looks to project Beijing as an alternative to U.S. volatility on the world stage.

stories.summary: China investors are counting on the summit between Xi Jinping and Donald Trump to deliver just enough to sustain the detente trade underpinning stocks and the yuan.

stories.headline: Virginia Officials Ask Supreme Court to Restore Voting Map Drawn by Democrats

stories.headline: Lawmakers Urge Trump to Move Ahead on Delayed Arms Sale to Taiwan
stories.summary: The Trump administration has held up the sale for months ahead of President Trump’s meeting this week with President Xi Jinping of China.

stories.headline: Rebranding Francafrique

stories.headline: France's President Emmanuel Macron defends Europe in Africa and urges investment

stories.summary: Hungary's new Prime Minister Péter Magyar, who was sworn in on Saturday, said that Hungary would no longer protect people wanted elsewhere.

stories.headline: Oil price predicted to remain above $100 for rest of year

stories.headline: 'Total lack of respect': Macron interrupts speaker to ask for silence
stories.summary: The French president stood up during a conference in Kenya to tell the audience to quieten down, saying it was “impossible” for speakers to be heard.

stories.headline: Hims’ Pivot to Branded Obesity Drugs Comes With Rising Costs
stories.summary: Hims & Hers Health Inc. reported a first-quarter loss and sales that missed Wall Street estimates as it faces higher costs associated with its strategic pivot to branded weight-loss medications.

stories.headline: Saudi Arabian Oil Exports to China Set for Deep Drop in June
stories.summary: Saudi Arabian crude oil exports to China for loading in June are set to plunge to around 13 million to 14 million barrels, according to traders informed by the producer.

stories.headline: Gen Z Shoppers Driving Traffic Growth at Simon’s Malls, CEO Says
stories.summary: Mall owner Simon Property Group Inc. is seeing strong interest from Gen Z shoppers and the brands that target them, Chief Executive Officer Eli Simon said on a call with investors.

stories.headline: Radio Station Owner Spanish Broadcasting Files Bankruptcy

stories.headline: UK Fintech Wise Makes US Trading Debut With Dual Listing
